task: Claude v14 implementation workers were blocked by a transient API rate limit, so this is a Codex write-capable retry. Fix the remaining readiness sender-authentication blocker. _sender_authentication must fail closed when a registered commander has session or run_dir metadata but LEGION_COMMANDER_SESSION or LEGION_COMMANDER_RUN_DIR is absent or mismatched; a spoofed LEGION_COMMANDER_ID alone must not verify. Add focused regressions proving spoofed commander-id READY messages do not satisfy readiness, while real launch contexts with matching session/run_dir still verify. Keep behavior for Legion Core system messages and intentionally unbound external commanders compatible. Final output must be strict JSON only.

Claude v14 implementation workers were blocked by a transient API rate limit, so this is a Codex write-capable retry. Fix shell/runtime blockers from isolated parity verification. Make top-level legion.sh dry-run/read-only entrypoints skip directory registration before mutating heredoc code: mixed campaign --dry-run, duo --dry-run, dou --dry-run, and existing status/inbox/readiness paths must work with invalid TMPDIR. Prefer the repository scripts/legion-commander.py over stale ~/.claude/scripts/legion-commander.py for this project, and ensure commander daemon startup writes at least one durable daemon_evidence.jsonl record with schema_version, evidence_id, project_hash, cwd, kind, and record_hash so retrospector has live daemon evidence after the daemon starts. Add focused tests or smoke checks without sharing write scope with tests/test_legion_core.py. Final output must be strict JSON only.

Claude v14 implementation workers were blocked by a transient API rate limit, so this is a Codex write-capable retry. Fix retrospector project-boundary and contract mismatch. Direct `bash scripts/retrospector.sh quick` must default to cwd and must not silently combine a stale inherited PROJECT_DIR from another project with the current mixed runtime; either ignore stale PROJECT_DIR unless an explicit trust marker is set, or fail with a clear structured blocker. Update the retrospective contract so I7 accurately describes the non-mutating patrol evidence scan or captured patrol-status equivalent. Verify direct quick with PROJECT_DIR pointing at another repo while cwd is legion-0 no longer reads the wrong project truth paths. Final output must be strict JSON only.
